def eligible_for_sleep_apnea_screening(self) -> bool:
        return (self.gender in [Gender.TRANSGENDER, Gender.NON_BINARY, Gender.MALE, Gender.FEMALE, Gender.GENDER_NEUTRAL] and
                self.age in [28, 30, 31, 44, 45, 46, 59, 60, 61] and
                self.race in [Race.ASIAN, Race.WHITE, Race.BLACK, Race.HISPANIC, Race.INDIAN] and
                self.employment_status in [EmploymentStatus.EMPLOYED, EmploymentStatus.RETIRED, EmploymentStatus.UNEMPLOYED, EmploymentStatus.STUDENT] and
                self.education in [Education.HIGH_SCHOOL, Education.COLLEGE, Education.BACHELOR, Education.MASTER, Education.DOCTOR] and
                self.marital_status in [MaritalStatus.SINGLE, MaritalStatus.MARRIED, MaritalStatus.WIDOWED, MaritalStatus.DIVORCED, MaritalStatus.LEGALLY_SEPARATED] and
                self.religion in [Religion.CHRISTIANITY, Religion.ISLAM, Religion.ATHEIST, Religion.HINDUISM, Religion.BUDDHISM] and
                (2.0 <= self.sleep_quality_score <= 4.0))
